$-- StockEase Page Template $ $-- ======================= $ $-- Pandoc HTML template used by the docs pipeline to render all $ $-- individual architecture documentation pages. $ $-- $ $-- Variables injected by Pandoc at build time: $ $-- $title$ — page title from the Markdown front matter $ $-- $body$ — rendered HTML content from the Markdown source $ $-- $root$ — relative path back to target/docs/ root $ $-- $ $-- Layout: sticky header + two-column grid (sidebar | content) + footer. $ $-- Sidebar is built dynamically from the navigation map in the script below. $ $-- $ $-- Stylesheets (paths are relative via $root$ so they resolve at any depth): $ $-- base.css — CSS variables, reset, typography, layout $ $-- component.css — sidebar, cards, code, tables, mermaid, print $ $-- $ $-- Dependencies: $ $-- Mermaid.js v10 (CDN) — renders architecture diagrams from fenced code blocks $
StockEase Docs
Home / Documentation
GitHub Docs Home
$body$
StockEase — Inventory Management System View on GitHub Documentation Home
$-- Sidebar navigation — built dynamically from the navigation object below. $ $-- Sections are collapsible via details/summary. $ $-- The section containing the active page is expanded automatically on load. $ $-- To add or remove entries, edit the navigation object only. $ $-- Mermaid diagram rendering — renders fenced mermaid code blocks as SVG diagrams. $ $-- The Lua filter converts code.language-mermaid blocks to div.mermaid before Pandoc runs. $
